results.alt:
Every breakthrough in microbiology has rewritten what we thought life
              could be. Here are four moments that opened doors we're still walking
              through. Three centuries of seeing the unseen

Eight-legged micro-animals that survive boiling water, absolute zero, the vacuum of space, and lethal radiation by suspending all metabolic activity for decades. Tardigrade

Beyond what the eye can see, an entire civilization thrives — bacteria,
            protists, tardigrades, and viruses building ecosystems on a cellular scale.
            Step into the invisible world that shapes life on Earth. Welcome to the MicroCosmos
